target: 39. Responsibility
First, we wash the wound. Hold out your arm.

I doubt it will heal with normal treatments like disinfection or suturing. We must not let our guard down.

24th... Summer Festival... Everyone gets killed by Shadows... The whole island... Everyone...

Yes…

(No way...)

But…

…Yes.

Nagumo-sensei!!
You were killed by Mio on the 23rd—meaning tomorrow, just past 3 PM... in the forest by the shrine.

Please... absolutely do not die...!!
"Fate can be changed." This is a perfect opportunity to prove it.

(But I defeated Shadow Mio... With this, Mio should be safe for now.)

Yeah...

Ginjiro Nezu

Sou.
